title: Infinite Gluttony
body:
# Eat EVERYTHING and anything!
### Experience Infinite Gluttony with this new Datapack for Minecraft 24w12a+

All blocks and items will become edible forever! Even new ones you pick!

For now, all of the blocks and items give the same amount of food and saturation! This does NOT modify existing foods like meat or golden carrots! These still work as intended!

Certain Items like Ender pearls, and Water bottles won't work since they have an already existing interaction.

Special thanks to Plagiatus for their help to diagnose certain errors!
 



Things to add to the data-pack:
- Different food & saturation depending on block/items

- Different possible potion effects
